title: AlbionPotionScanner Potion Recipe Database
description: Validates the Version 1 potion recipe database used by AlbionPotionScanner. The database is an array of PotionRecipe entries derived from docs/domain-model.md.

AlbionItemId.description: Albion item identifier. Supports tiered item IDs, optional enchantment suffixes, and unique item IDs.

PotionItemId.description: Version 1 potion item identifier. Only T4 through T8 potion item IDs are valid for profitability scanning.

PotionTier.description: Potion tier included in the Version 1 profitability scan.

IngredientTier.description: Ingredient tier when known and relevant to validation or display.

PotionRecipe.description: One craftable potion recipe that can be evaluated for profitability. A recipe contains no market prices, taxes, crafting fees, or calculated profit.

recipe_id.description: Stable unique identifier for the recipe. For Version 1, this must match the produced potion item ID.

potion_item_id.description: Albion item ID of the crafted potion.

family.description: Potion family, such as Healing Potion or Poison Potion.

enchantment_level.description: Enchantment level for the produced potion. Use 0 for the base item and positive values for enchanted variants.

output_quantity.description: Number of potion units produced by one craft action.

ingredients.description: Ingredients consumed by one craft action before Material Return Rate is applied.

source_reference.description: Reference to the research source used to define the recipe.

Ingredient.description: One item required to craft a potion. Ingredients contain no market price data.

item_id.description: Albion item ID of the required ingredient.

quantity.description: Quantity required for one craft action before Material Return Rate is applied.
